title: Duplicate conditional formatting
excerpt: I have conditional formatting on one column that I want to copy to 50 more columns. Can I maybe use de REST calls that the web application uses? Is that possible or should I do it all manually?

posts.author: Topdownjohnny (John)
posts.cookedHtml: I have conditional formatting on one column that I want to copy to 50 more columns. Can I maybe use de REST calls that the web application uses? Is that possible or should I do it all manually?

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Topdownjohnny!

Great question-- in this case I’m not sure if you’re referring to making API calls for this purpose, but if so, I’m afraid this functionality isn’t yet supported by our API at this time.

I think manually setting up these conditional coloring (I’m assuming is what you’re referring to?) will work.

Thanks!
Helen
